info.name: ClaimInsight360 — Complete API Collection v2
info.description:
Insurance Claims Analytics & Intelligence Platform

✅ All endpoints verified against live running services
✅ Correct request body schemas (field names, types, enums)
✅ All 6 roles covered

Roles & Access:
• Claims Analyst    → /api/feeds, /api/ingest, /api/kpis, /api/denial-patterns, /api/leakage-flags
• Claims Manager    → /api/kpis, /api/adjusters, /api/sla-violations, /api/costs, /api/reserves, /api/aging
• Fraud Analyst     → /api/risk-scores, /api/risk-indicators, /api/denial-patterns, /api/leakage-flags
• Actuary           → /api/kpis, /api/costs, /api/reserves, /api/aging
• Operations Exec   → /api/kpis, /api/adjusters, /api/sla-violations
• Admin             → All endpoints including /api/audit

Setup:
1. Import collection into Postman
2. Run 'Register — Admin' request
3. Run 'Login — Admin' — token is auto-saved to {{admin_token}}
4. Run 'Login — Any User' — token is auto-saved to {{token}}
5. All protected requests use {{token}} or {{admin_token}}

item.name: 🔐 Authentication & Users
item.description: Register and login for all 6 roles. Run Login requests first — tokens are auto-extracted via test scripts.

request.description: ✅ Returns 201 Created. Requires API Gateway to have restarted after Role enum update.
✅ Verified working. Returns 201 Created with {token, username, role}.
✅ Verified working. Returns {token, username, role}. Token is auto-saved to {{token}} variable.
✅ Verified working. Token is auto-saved to {{admin_token}} variable.

item.name: 📥 Data Ingestion — Feeds (Analyst, Admin)
item.description:
Service: data-ingestion-service (port 8082)
Gateway route: /api/feeds/** → lb://data-ingestion-service

✅ VERIFIED WORKING

request.description: ✅ Returns 200 with list of DataFeed objects.
✅ Returns 200 with a single DataFeed.

✅ VERIFIED. Returns 201 Created.

feedType enum: CLAIM | POLICY | PAYMENT | RESERVE
status enum: ACTIVE | INACTIVE | FAILED
sourceSystem: 2-100 chars, letters only

⚠️ feedName, fileCount, recordCount are NOT valid fields.
Update feed status. Values: ACTIVE | INACTIVE | FAILED
✅ Returns 204 No Content.

item.name: 📥 Data Ingestion — Raw Claims (Analyst, Admin)
item.description:
Service: data-ingestion-service (port 8082)
Gateway route: /api/ingest/** → lb://data-ingestion-service

✅ VERIFIED WORKING

request.description: ✅ Returns 200 with list of ClaimRaw objects.

item.name: Get Raw Claim by Claim ID

request.description: ✅ Returns 200. Use a real claimId that exists in the database.

item.name: Get Raw Claims by Feed ID

request.description:
✅ VERIFIED. Returns 200.

⚠️ feedId is a Long (integer), NOT a string like 'FEED-001'
⚠️ feedType is NOT a field in this request — only claimId, feedId, payloadJson

claimId: 3-100 chars, alphanumeric/dash/underscore only
feedId: must reference an existing feed (use Create Data Feed first)
Delete by rawId (auto-generated Long ID, not claimId string)

item.name: 📊 Claims Analytics — KPIs (Analyst, Manager, Actuary, Ops Exec, Admin)
item.description:
Service: claims-metrics-service (port 8083)
Gateway route: /api/kpis/** → lb://claims-metrics-service

⚠️ Requires claims-metrics-service to be running

request.description: metricName values: TAT | CYCLE_TIME | SEVERITY | FREQUENCY | LOSS_RATIO
⚠️ Query params are 'start' and 'end', NOT 'startDate'/'endDate'

metricName enum: TAT | CYCLE_TIME | SEVERITY | FREQUENCY | LOSS_RATIO
metricValue: decimal >= 0.0
metricDate: yyyy-MM-dd format
Calculates and saves all 5 KPI metrics (TAT, CYCLE_TIME, SEVERITY, FREQUENCY, LOSS_RATIO) for the given claim.

item.name: 💰 Financial — Costs (Actuary, Manager, Admin)
item.description:
Service: cost-reserve-service (port 8089)
Gateway route: /api/costs/** → lb://cost-reserve-service

✅ VERIFIED WORKING (GET endpoints confirmed)

request.description: ✅ Returns 200 with list of ClaimCost objects.
costType enum: MEDICAL | LEGAL | REPAIR | SETTLEMENT

✅ VERIFIED CORRECT SCHEMA. Returns 201 Created.

costType enum: MEDICAL | LEGAL | REPAIR | SETTLEMENT
amount: decimal > 0
costDate: yyyy-MM-dd

⚠️ Field is 'costDate' NOT 'incurredDate'

item.name: 💰 Financial — Reserves (Actuary, Manager, Admin)
item.description:
Service: cost-reserve-service (port 8089)
Gateway route: /api/reserves/** → lb://cost-reserve-service

✅ VERIFIED WORKING

request.description: ✅ Returns 200.
✅ Returns 200 with total reserve amount.
✅ Returns 200 with latest reserve summary per claim.

item.name: Get Monthly Reserve Trend for Claim

request.description:
✅ VERIFIED. Returns 201 Created.

reserveAmount: decimal > 0
updatedDate: yyyy-MM-dd

⚠️ 'reserveType' is NOT a field — do not include it

item.name: 💰 Financial — Aging (Actuary, Manager, Admin)
item.description:
Service: cost-reserve-service (port 8089)
Gateway route: /api/aging/** → lb://cost-reserve-service

✅ VERIFIED WORKING (GET confirmed)

request.description: ✅ Returns 200.

item.name: Get Aging Records by Claim ID

request.description: agingBucket enum: BUCKET_0_30 | BUCKET_31_60 | BUCKET_61_90 | BUCKET_90_PLUS

item.name: Get Escalated Claims (Aged Beyond N Days)

request.description:
✅ VERIFIED CORRECT SCHEMA. Returns 201 Created.

agingBucket enum: BUCKET_0_30 | BUCKET_31_60 | BUCKET_61_90 | BUCKET_90_PLUS
agingDays: integer >= 0

⚠️ 'agingBucket' is REQUIRED — do not send without it

Bucket guide:
  BUCKET_0_30    → 0–30 days
  BUCKET_31_60   → 31–60 days (agingDays: 45)
  BUCKET_61_90   → 61–90 days (agingDays: 75)
  BUCKET_90_PLUS → 91+ days   (agingDays: 95)

item.name: 👥 Adjuster Operations — Performance (Manager, Ops Exec, Admin)
item.description:
Service: AdjusterAndOperations (port 8087)
Gateway route: /api/adjusters/** → lb://AdjusterAndOperations

⚠️ Requires AdjusterAndOperations service to be running

request.description: threshold: minimum claimsHandled to not be considered low productivity (default 20)

Required: adjusterId (Long), period (String)
Optional: claimsHandled, totalDaysTaken, slaMetCount, slaBreachedCount, deniedClaimsCount, errorRate (0-100)

Calculated fields (do not include): avgTat, qualityScore, denialRate, slaComplianceRate, performanceIndex

item.name: 👥 Adjuster Operations — SLA Violations (Manager, Ops Exec, Admin)
item.description:
Service: AdjusterAndOperations (port 8087)
Gateway route: /api/sla-violations/** → lb://AdjusterAndOperations

⚠️ Requires AdjusterAndOperations service to be running

request.description:
⚠️ claimId is a Long (FK to a claim record), NOT a String like 'CLM-001'
adjusterId: Long
violationType: validated string (e.g., RESPONSE_TIME, SETTLEMENT_DELAY, DOCUMENTATION)
slaTargetDays: int >= 1
actualDays: int >= 1
violationDate: yyyy-MM-dd

item.name: 🔔 Notifications (All Roles)
item.description:
Service: NotificationService (port 8088)
Gateway route: /api/notifications/** → lb://NotificationService

⚠️ Requires NotificationService to be running

request.description: userId: Long — use the numeric userId from your JWT token
status enum: UNREAD | READ | DISMISSED | ACTIONED
category enum: RISK | DENIAL | COST | PERFORMANCE | AGING | SYSTEM

body.raw:
{
  "userId": 1,
  "title": "High Risk Score Detected",
  "message": "Claim CLM-2026-AUTO-001 has a risk score of 87. Immediate review recommended.",
  "category": "RISK",
  "referenceId": "CLM-2026-AUTO-001"
}

request.description:
category enum: RISK | DENIAL | COST | PERFORMANCE | AGING | SYSTEM
referenceId: optional, max 50 chars (e.g., claim ID)
status is auto-set to UNREAD on creation
status enum: UNREAD | READ | DISMISSED | ACTIONED

item.name: 🔍 Fraud Risk — Risk Scores (Fraud Analyst, Admin)
item.description:
Service: fraud-risk-service
Gateway route: /api/risk-scores/** → lb://fraud-risk-service

⚠️ Requires fraud-risk-service to be running

item.name: Get Risk Scores by Claim ID
Get Latest Risk Score for Claim

request.description: Returns all risk scores with scoreValue >= threshold (0-100)

scoreValue: Double (validated by @ValidateScoreValue — likely 0.0 to 100.0)
computedDate: yyyy-MM-dd

item.name: 🔍 Fraud Risk — Risk Indicators (Fraud Analyst, Admin)
item.description:
Service: fraud-risk-service
Gateway route: /api/risk-indicators/** → lb://fraud-risk-service

⚠️ Requires fraud-risk-service to be running

item.name: Get Risk Indicators by Claim ID

request.description:
indicatorType enum: HighCost | UnusualTiming | Pattern
⚠️ PascalCase — NOT SCREAMING_SNAKE_CASE
severity: validated by @ValidateSeverity (likely: LOW | MEDIUM | HIGH | CRITICAL)

indicatorType enum: HighCost | UnusualTiming | Pattern  (PascalCase)
severity: LOW | MEDIUM | HIGH | CRITICAL  (validated by custom validator)
triggeredDate: yyyy-MM-dd

item.name: 📋 Denial & Leakage — Denial Patterns (Analyst, Fraud Analyst, Admin)
item.description:
Service: denial-leakage-service
Gateway route: /api/denial-patterns/** → lb://denial-leakage-service

⚠️ Requires denial-leakage-service to be running

item.name: Get Denial Patterns by Claim ID
Get Denial Patterns by Denial Code

request.description: Common denial codes: CO-4, PR-96, CO-97, CO-50, PR-204

denialCode: validated by @ValidateDenialCode (format like CO-4, PR-96)
reason: required string
occurrenceDate: yyyy-MM-dd, must not be in the future (@PastOrPresent)

item.name: 📋 Denial & Leakage — Leakage Flags (Analyst, Fraud Analyst, Admin)
item.description:
Service: denial-leakage-service
Gateway route: /api/leakage-flags/** → lb://denial-leakage-service

⚠️ Requires denial-leakage-service to be running

item.name: Get Leakage Flags by Claim ID

request.description: leakageType enum: Overpayment | Delay | Error  (PascalCase)

item.name: Get Leakage Flags by Estimated Loss

request.description: Returns leakage flags where estimatedLoss >= specified amount

leakageType enum: Overpayment | Delay | Error  (PascalCase — NOT UPPER_CASE)
estimatedLoss: Double (validated by @ValidateEstimatedLoss)
identifiedDate: yyyy-MM-dd, must not be in the future (@PastOrPresent)

item.name: 📊 Analytics Reports (All Roles)
item.description:
Service: analytics-report-service
Gateway route: /api/reports/** → lb://analytics-report-service

⚠️ Requires analytics-report-service to be running

request.description: scope enum: PRODUCT | REGION | CLAIM_TYPE | PERIOD
Aggregated analytics summary for dashboard widgets
Aggregates data from multiple services (costs, reserves, KPIs) for a single claim

scope enum: PRODUCT | REGION | CLAIM_TYPE | PERIOD
scopeValue: free text (e.g., 'North Region', 'Auto', 'Q1-2024')
metrics: comma-separated list of metric names
generatedDate: yyyy-MM-dd
generatedBy: username of who triggered the report
reportData: optional JSON snapshot

item.description:
Embedded in API Gateway (port 8086). No separate service needed.

✅ VERIFIED WORKING
Uses {{admin_token}} — requires ROLE_ADMIN
